Year: The year of the data point, in this case it would be 2022.
Province: The name of the province for which the compliance score and revenue growth rate is being reported.
Compliance_Score: The provincial compliance score for MediConn, indicating the level of adherence to regulatory guidelines.
Revenue_Growth_Rate: The growth rate of regional revenue for the specific province in the given year.
Correlation_r_Value: The correlation (r-value) between the provincial compliance scores and the regional revenue growth rates.
